enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a lively and fun atmosphere, celebrating the glamour and excitement of life.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Pichaikkaran, the song is featured during a festive moment, highlighting the joyous spirit of the characters.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Velmurugan and composed by Vijay Antony.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 7, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The Glamour Song from Pichaikkaran is an upbeat and energetic track that encapsulates the joy of celebration. It showcases the vibrant life and glamour that the characters aspire to, making it a perfect fit for party scenes. The lively beats and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of excitement and happiness, inviting listeners to dance along. Overall, the song serves as a reminder to embrace life's festive moments with enthusiasm.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Glamour Song from Pichaikkaran is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration. With Velmurugan's lively vocals and Vijay Antony's catchy composition, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious rhythm and fun vibes that make this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: In this world full of glamour, money is abundant. Without that money, even the purse will be empty.
Four people can live well if you see justice and righteousness.
Those four people are the ones you should follow in life.
They are going to the temple to offer prayers.
If he says he is a lion, he will catch the tiger at home.
By saying the name Gandhi, he will make the village respect him.
Even when the leader goes to jail, he will still have AC.
In this world full of glamour, money is abundant. Without that money, even the purse will be empty.
They will be released, and everyone will be tied to justice.
When they go to the stage, they will hear the complaints. All the black money is hidden here.
Those who have lost their way will be taken care of by the people.
Those who have no light will become priests.
They will become doctors by getting seats through quotas.
They are making mistakes and hitting with a stick.
The killing and robbery have increased.
The Tamil culture has been forgotten.
We will forget everything and celebrate. We will celebrate our freedom and food.
In this world full of glamour, money is abundant. Without that money, even the purse will be empty.
Four people can live well if you see justice and righteousness.
Those four people are the ones you should follow in life.
They are going to the temple to offer prayers.
If he says he is a lion, he will catch the tiger at home.
By saying the name Gandhi, he will make the village respect him.
Even when the leader goes to jail, he will still have AC.
In this world full of glamour, money is abundant. Without that money, even the purse will be empty.
